data.content: Implemented version check in kno doctor. Queries GitHub releases API (https://api.github.com/repos/acartine/knots/releases/latest) with 5s timeout via curl subprocess. Compares semver versions using pure Rust helpers (parse_tag, strip_v_prefix, is_outdated). Shows Pass when current, Warn when outdated with `kno upgrade` hint, Warn on network failure. All branches tested via build_version_check() extraction. PR #10: https://github.com/acartine/knots/pull/10. Coverage 95.09%.
